rows.label: tev027201_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire

rows.label: tev027201_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Milly about her mission.

rows.label: tev027201_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss

rows.label: tev027201_SEL0021
rows.name:
Ask Milly if she's heard
any interesting rumors.

rows.label: tev027201_SEL0031
rows.name: Ask Milly about her mission.

rows.label: tev027201_SEL1021
rows.name: Ask Milly about recent developments.

rows.label: tev027201_SEL1031
rows.name: Ask Milly about life in the caravan.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev027201_MSG0001
rows.name:
After NLA signed that friendship treaty
or whatever with the Nopon, Vandham
assigned me to this caravan indefinitely.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev027201_MSG0002
rows.name:
At first I was pissed. It's dry as
a dead dilus's butt out here, and
I kept getting sand in my mouth.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev027201_MSG0003
rows.name:
But I like the caravan leader,
Tsumuji. He's got a mouth on him,
but deep down he's a nice guy.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev027201_MSG0004
rows.name:
The Nopon give me lots of great
food to eat, and they bundle
up close when it gets cold.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev027201_MSG0005
rows.name:
And I guess more than anything,
they're really cute— so it's hard
to stay mad at anything for long.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev027201_MSG0008
rows.name:
Never turn your back on the weather here
in Valley of Oblivion, I tell you what.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev027201_MSG0014
rows.name:
When the heat waves come, you feel like your skin's
peeling off, but you're too hot to do anything
about it. Bad time for close-quarters combat.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev027201_MSG0015
rows.name:
And when the sandstorms come? Hoo-ee! You
can't see a foot in front of you, and none
of your attacks seem to find their mark.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev027201_MSG0020
rows.name:
I hear the BLADE pros use the
heat waves to their advantage and
fight with heat-based attacks.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev027201_MSG0021
rows.name:
But I don't know about that. The last
thing I want to do when I'm hot is
add more heat to the equation...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev027201_MSG0009
rows.name:
I wonder when they'll call me back
from this mission with the caravan.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev027201_MSG0010
rows.name:
I mean, the BLADEs back in the
city are having a tough time
fighting off the Growth, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev027201_MSG0011
rows.name: Don't they want me to go back and help?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev027201_MSG0012
rows.name:
It's a shame I have to stay out here, nestled
in the warm, soft, spherical embrace of the
Nopon, doing nothing but clerical work...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev027201_MSG0013
rows.name:
But those are my orders! So I guess I must
leave the city in your capable hands.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev027201_MSG0016
rows.name: I'm glad Henahena is feeling better now.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev027201_MSG0017
rows.name:
When she was sick, it took her a whole week
to eat just one cosse bean. Now she can down
a whole bucket in three seconds flat![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev027201_MSG0018
rows.name:
Of course, that means she's
also filling out even more...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev027201_MSG0019
rows.name:
Well, as long as she's healthy, I guess I
don't care. Oh, and we also found her boyfriend,
so that's another piece of good news.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev027201_MSG1001
rows.name: Hey, nice work on the mission![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev027201_MSG1002
rows.name:
The moment HQ sent word of the
Growth's defeat, Tsumuji gave
me a big pat on the back.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev027201_MSG1003
rows.name:
Then he threw a little party to
celebrate. Can you believe it?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev027201_MSG1004
rows.name:
I wish I could have gone to the
city to help out with the fight,
but my place was here.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev027201_MSG1005
rows.name:
Tsumuji's got a mouth on him,
but he's a good leader. I
wouldn't want to let him down.[ST:wait ]
